errors: Y from matmul may be non-contiguous; kernel add_A_T_kernel assumes row-major layout and would write to wrong memory if Y is non-contiguous.
suggested_fixes: Call Y = Y.contiguous() before the add_A_T_kernel launch to ensure row-major contiguous layout.
Consider adding cudaDeviceSynchronize() before each cudaGetLastError() for more reliable error detection.
warnings: cudaGetLastError() is called after kernel launch without synchronization; asynchronous errors may be missed.
Kernels use scalar loads; vectorized loads could improve performance but are not required for correctness.
